message:
Add version specifiers and crates.io metadata for publishing

Add version = "0.1.0" to all internal workspace deps (required by cargo
publish), update asupersync to 0.2.5 and ftui to 0.2.1 (published
versions), remove local path deps for external crates, add readme/
keywords/categories to workspace package, mark harness and e2e crates
as publish = false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
